invalidation.zh: 失效条件：价格跌破$1920（基于ATR调整），或融资费率Z-score升至极端（>80%）且价格停滞，或Qlib分大幅下降。
invalidation.en: Invalidation: Price breaks below $1920 (adjusted based on ATR), or funding rate Z-score rises to extreme (>80%) with price stalling, or Qlib score drops significantly.

invalidation.zh: 失效条件：价格跌破$65500（基于ATR调整），或融资费率转正且价格停滞，或恐慌指数回升至中性。
invalidation.en: Invalidation: Price breaks below $65500 (adjusted based on ATR), or funding rate turns positive with price stalling, or Fear & Greed Index recovers to neutral.

invalidation.zh: 失效条件：价格跌破$0.088（基于ATR 0.0014和当前价$0.0917的约4%止损），或融资费率Z-score升至极端（>80%）且价格停滞，或Qlib分大幅下降。
invalidation.en: Invalidation: Price breaks below $0.088 (based on ATR 0.0014 and ~4% stop loss from current $0.0917), or funding rate Z-score rises to extreme (>80%) with price stalling, or Qlib score drops significantly.
